en: The men of Ephraim were called to arms, and they crossed to Zaphon and said to Jephthah, "Why did you cross over to fight against the Ammonites and did not call us to go with you? We will burn your house over you with fire."
zh: 以法蓮人聚集起來，過河到了撒分，對耶弗他說：“你過去攻打亞捫人的時候，為甚麼沒有召我們與你同去呢？我們要用火燒掉你和你的房屋。”

en: And Jephthah said to them, "I and my people had a great dispute with the Ammonites, and when I called you, you did not save me from their hand.
zh: 耶弗他對他們說：“我和我的人民跟亞捫人激烈爭戰的時候，我曾經呼求你們，你們卻沒有來救我們脫離他們的手。

en: And when I saw that you would not save me, I took my life in my hand and crossed over against the Ammonites, and the LORD gave them into my hand. Why then have you come up to me this day to fight against me?"
zh: 我見你們不來拯救我，我就拚命上去攻擊亞捫人，耶和華就把他們交在我的手裡。你們今日為甚麼上我這裡來攻打我呢？”

en: Then Jephthah gathered all the men of Gilead and fought with Ephraim. And the men of Gilead struck Ephraim, because they said, "You are fugitives of Ephraim, you Gileadites, in the midst of Ephraim and Manasseh."
zh: 於是耶弗他召集了基列所有的人，與以法蓮人爭戰；基列人擊殺了以法蓮人，因為以法蓮人曾經說過：“你們基列人在以法蓮和瑪拿西中間，不過是以法蓮逃亡的人罷了。”

en: And the Gileadites captured the fords of the Jordan against the Ephraimites. And when any of the fugitives of Ephraim said, "Let me go over," the men of Gilead said to him, "Are you an Ephraimite?" When he said, "No,"
zh: 基列人佔領約旦河的各渡口，不容以法蓮人過去。如果以法蓮逃亡的人說：“讓我過去吧。”基列人就問他：“你是以法蓮人嗎？”如果他說：“不是。”

en: they said to him, "Then say Shibboleth," and he said, "Sibboleth," for he could not pronounce it right. Then they seized him and slaughtered him at the fords of the Jordan. At that time 42,000 of the Ephraimites fell.
zh: 基列人就對他說：“請說‘示播列’。”以法蓮人因為發不出準確的字音，就說成“西播列”；基列人就把他捉住，在約旦河的渡口那裡殺了；那時以法蓮人死了四萬二千人。

en: Jephthah judged Israel six years. Then Jephthah the Gileadite died and was buried in his city in Gilead.
zh: 耶弗他治理以色列人共六年；基列人耶弗他死了以後，埋葬在基列其中的一座城裡。

en: After him Ibzan of Bethlehem judged Israel.
zh: 耶弗他之後，有伯利恆人以比讚治理以色列人。

en: He had thirty sons, and thirty daughters he gave in marriage outside his clan, and thirty daughters he brought in from outside for his sons. And he judged Israel seven years.
zh: 他有三十個兒子，三十個女兒；女兒都嫁到外面去，又給他的兒子從外面娶了三十個女子作妻子。他治理以色列人共七年。

en: Then Ibzan died and was buried at Bethlehem.
zh: 以比讚死了，就埋葬在伯利恆。

en: After him Elon the Zebulunite judged Israel, and he judged Israel ten years.
zh: 以比讚之後，有西布倫人以倫，治理以色列人共十年。

en: Then Elon the Zebulunite died and was buried at Aijalon in the land of Zebulun.
zh: 西布倫人以倫死了以後，就埋葬在西布倫地的亞雅崙。

en: After him Abdon the son of Hillel the Pirathonite judged Israel.
zh: 以倫之後，有比拉頓人希列的兒子押頓治理以色列人。

en: He had forty sons and thirty grandsons, who rode on seventy donkeys, and he judged Israel eight years.
zh: 他有四十個兒子，三十個孫子，騎著七十頭驢駒；押頓治理以色列人共八年。

en: Then Abdon the son of Hillel the Pirathonite died and was buried at Pirathon in the land of Ephraim, in the hill country of the Amalekites.
zh: 比拉頓人希列的兒子押頓死了，埋葬在以法蓮地，就是在亞瑪力人的山地。
